description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chest of drawers constructed from light-colored wood, likely birch or maple, with a natural wood grain pattern visible across all surfaces. The chest features four spacious drawers, each with a minimalist recessed groove serving as a handle, giving the piece a clean and contemporary appearance. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The sides and back are plain, with no additional ornamentation or hardware, emphasizing the functional and streamlined design. The chest stands on short, sturdy legs that slightly elevate it off the ground, providing stability and a subtle shadow gap. There are no visible locks, brand markings, or decorative embellishments, making it versatile for various urban settings such as apartment lobbies, office waiting areas, or residential garages.
description: A modern, light wood chest of drawers with four recessed-handle drawers and a clean, minimalist design. The surface is flat and the wood grain is visible throughout.
description_view_0: Front view showing four drawers with recessed handles and the full wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, unadorned wood panel and the side profile of the drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless, flat wood panel with no visible hardware or openings.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the side profile of the drawers and plain wood panel.
